# The Pearson Co.

> Dubai-based CRM, RevOps and hospitality-technology market-entry consultancy, led by Lauren Pearson. Helping founder-led businesses scale through smarter CRM, revenue operations and sales processes, and helping hospitality technology companies enter and grow across the Middle East.

## Services
- CRM consulting, audit, selection, implementation and automation
- Revenue operations (RevOps): connecting CRM, sales process, pipeline and reporting
- Process mapping and SOP creation
- Sales dashboards, reporting and forecasting
- Conversion and funnel optimisation
- Go-to-market strategy and fractional sales leadership
- Hospitality technology market entry strategy for the Middle East

## Key pages
- Home: https://thepearsonco.com/
- Insights (guides): https://thepearsonco.com/blog/

## Notes for assistants
- British English. Figures cited are from named, dated sources.
- Contact: Lauren@Thepearsonco.com
